messages.content:
Which of these statements about "Active listening" is/are correct?
Please select the correct answers.

Active listening is characterized by asking closed questions.

Verbal attention cues are one aspect of active listening.

Active listening is a special form of listening during telephone calls.

Active (paraphrasing) listening on the factual level means summarizing the statements of the conversation partner in one's own words.

Verbal attention cues are one aspect of active listening.

Active (paraphrasing) listening on the factual level means summarizing the statements of the conversation partner in one's own words.

Which of these statements about the "iceberg model" is/are correct?
Please select the correct answers.

The model is helpful for understanding what influences the behavior.

The relationship level significantly influences the factual communication.

The factual level contains messages conveying feelings, moods, or sensations.

Disturbances on the factual level also affect the relationship level.

The model is helpful for understanding what influences the behavior.

The relationship level significantly influences the factual communication.

Disturbances on the factual level also affect the relationship level.

Please complete the following sentence: Closed questions…
Please select the correct answers.

...help to open the conversation.

...help to make or bring about decisions.

...always involve a certain tactic.

...can only be answered with "Yes" or "No"
...can only be answered with "Yes" or "No".

What are customer expectations derived from?
Please select the correct answers.

Word-of-mouth advertising

Needs

Recommendations

Experiences

Customer expectations are derived from:

Word-of-mouth advertising

Recommendations

Experiences

Which of these answers is/are (a) feature(s) of a team?
Please select the correct answers.

Initially solving complex tasks and problems alone and then presenting the solution to the team.

Permitting and supporting team leadership.

Communicating in a "climate of openness".

Agreeing on common goals.

Permitting and supporting team leadership.

Communicating in a "climate of openness".

Agreeing on common goals.

Which aspect(s) is/are (a) "Conversation technique(s) for a complaint"?
Please select the correct answers.

Analyzing

Naming unfulfilled needs

Reflecting the customer

Actively listening and inquiring (comprehension questions)

Naming unfulfilled needs

Reflecting the customer

Actively listening and inquiring (comprehension questions)

What levels does the "iceberg model" of communication describe?
Please select the correct answers.

The relationship level: This is about subjective aspects such as feelings, needs and attitudes.

The factual level: This is about the objective content of the communication, such as facts and figures and things that can be observed.

The appeal level: Threats and disappointments are highlighted here.

The body language level: This is where all non-verbal signals can be interpreted.

The correct answers are:

The relationship level: This is about subjective aspects such as feelings, needs, and attitudes.

The factual level: This is about the objective content of the communication, such as facts and figures and things that can be observed.

The body language level: This is where all non-verbal signals can be interpreted.

Which of the following terms belong to the principles of written communication at Mercedes-Benz?
Please select the correct answers.

Think like a partner

Respond reasonably

Write personally

Be proactive

The correct answers are:

Think like a partner

Respond reasonably

Be proactive

Which of these answers is/are (a) phase(s) of perception?
Please select the correct answers.

Action phase

Misinterpretation phase

Assessment/opinion forming phase

Stimulus phase

The correct answers are:

Misinterpretation phase

Assessment/opinion forming phase

Stimulus phase

Which of the following statements regarding "retention of title" is/are correct?
Please select the correct answers.

If "retention of title" was agreed upon, the buyer may already use the item even though the purchase price has not yet been paid in full.

The seller remains the owner of the item until the purchase price has been paid in full.

An agreement on "retention of title" between business people is not permissible.

An agreement on "retention of title" is only legally valid if the contracting parties arrange this in writing.

The correct answers are:

The seller remains the owner of the item until the purchase price has been paid in full.

An agreement on "retention of title" is only legally valid if the contracting parties arrange this in writing.

Paraphrasing can begin with the following sentence starters....
Please select the correct answers.

"As I explained to you earlier... ."

"So you're saying that...?"

"Have I understood you correctly as saying that ...?"

"Let me recap: So you have...?"

The correct answers are:

"So you're saying that...?"

"Have I understood you correctly as saying that ...?"

"Let me recap: So you have...?"

Which of these statements about "Open-ended questions" is/are correct?
Please select the correct answers.

Open-ended questions are used to shorten the conversation.

"What is especially important to you?" is an open-ended question.

Open-ended questions are also called "W questions".

Asking open-ended questions will return the most customer information.

The correct answer is:

"What is especially important to you?" is an open-ended question.

Asking open-ended questions will return the most customer information.

Which of the following statements about customer expectations is/are correct?
Please select the correct answers.

The most important customer expectation is a favorable price.

Customer expectations arise, among other things, from corporate communication and word-of-mouth advertising.

Customer expectations arise from needs and experiences, among other things.

Customer expectations are as individual as our customers.

The correct answers are:

Customer expectations arise, among other things, from corporate communication and word-of-mouth advertising.

Customer expectations arise from needs and experiences, among other things.

Customer expectations are as individual as our customers.

Which of these statements about "basic emotions according to Paul Ekman" is/are correct?
Please select the correct answers.

These basic emotions are recognized and expressed in the same manner by all people across all cultures.

The facial expressions described by Paul Ekman are culturally learnable.

Paul Ekman differentiates between eight basic emotions.

According to Ekman, there are 43 muscles with which over 10,000 facial expressions can be made.

The correct answers are:

These basic emotions are recognized and expressed in the same manner by all people across all cultures.

According to Ekman, there are 43 muscles with which over 10,000 facial expressions can be made.

Which of these answers is/are a result of satisfaction?
Please select the correct answers.

Loyalty

Recommendations

Complaint

Magic moments

The correct answers are:

Loyalty

Recommendations

Magic moments

Which of these answers is/are (a) "level(s) of nonverbal communication"?
Please select the correct answers.

Eye contact

Emotions

Language

Gestures

The correct answers are:

Eye contact

Emotions

Gestures

What right/s does the customer have in the event of a material defect?
Please select the correct answers.

Goodwill entitlement

Right to revocation

Compensation

Retrospective fulfillment

The correct answers are:

Goodwill entitlement

Compensation

Retrospective fulfillment

Which of these answers is/are (an) aspect/s of the "Passive understanding phase"?
Please select the correct answers.

Listening attentively and actively

Selecting positive phrases

Verbalizing the customer's needs

Projecting understanding actively and explicitly

The correct answers are:

Listening attentively and actively

Projecting understanding actively and explicitly

Which of the statements about "contract law" is/are correct?
Please select the correct answers.

A flyer with special discounts is considered an offer in the sense of a contract.

A declaration of intent is an expression of will which is directed towards a legal result.

In the case of business people who maintain an ongoing business relationship, no response to an offer indicates acceptance.

A contract comes about through an "offer" and "acceptance" of that offer.

The correct answers are:

A declaration of intent is an expression of will which is directed towards a legal result.

A contract comes about through an "offer" and "acceptance" of that offer.

Please complete the following sentence: "Showing listening" is demonstrated with …
Please select the correct answers.

...verbal signals showing your attentiveness.

...listening without saying anything.

...eye contact.

...interrupting the conversation partner.

The correct answers are:

...verbal signals showing your attentiveness.

...listening without saying anything.

...eye contact.

Which of the following statements about the "sender-receiver model" is/are correct?
Please select the correct answers.

Non-verbal communication guarantees successful communication between sender and receiver.

The sender-recipient model defines communication as the transmission of a message from a sender A to a recipient B.

In addition to the "what", the "how" of communication is important to ensure a successful exchange between sender and receiver.

When the sender has interpreted the receiver's intention, they initiate a new process of communication with their answer.

The correct answers are:

The sender-recipient model defines communication as the transmission of a message from a sender A to a recipient B.

In addition to the "what", the "how" of communication is important to ensure a successful exchange between sender and receiver.

When the sender has interpreted the receiver's intention, they initiate a new process of communication with their answer.

Which of the following statements regarding "Best Customer Experience" is/are correct?
Please select the correct answers.

"Best Customer Experience" brings together a variety of new approaches in marketing, sales and after-sales to deliver a consistent premium brand experience to customers across all brand touchpoints.

Best Customer Experience is a broad-based marketing and sales program in the Mercedes-Benz Cars business division.

The guiding principle of "Best Customer Experience" is: The focus is on the customer!

"Best Customer Experience" means: Increasing customer satisfaction through product customization.

The correct answers are:

"Best Customer Experience" brings together a variety of new approaches in marketing, sales, and after-sales to deliver a consistent premium brand experience to customers across all brand touchpoints.

The guiding principle of "Best Customer Experience" is: The focus is on the customer!

Which of these answers is/are (a) prerequisite(s) for "Active listening"?
Please select the correct answers.

Paraphrasing is the essential method of "Active listening".

Paraphrasing goes hand in hand with a variety of standard phrases that are used to signal to the conversation partner that their main concern, their priority, their experience, and also their opinion have been recognized and are reflected over the continued course of the conversation.

A paraphrase is a repetition of words where only individual statements are included.

Paraphrases quote the statements made by the conversation partner.

The correct answers are:

Paraphrasing goes hand in hand with a variety of standard phrases that are used to signal to the conversation partner that their main concern, their priority, their experience, and also their opinion have been recognized and are reflected over the continued course of the conversation.

Which of the following statements about the "team" is/are correct?
Please select the correct answers.

Team capability is the ability of each individual to work together with others in a positive way.

Team development is an automatic improvement process that starts after teams have been formed or restructured.

A team is always created when several people work together towards a common goal.

A functioning team is based on different objectives and working groups under common leadership.

The correct answer is:

A team is always created when several people work together towards a common goal.

Which of these statements about types of questions is/are correct?
Please select the correct answers.

Rhetorical questions promote customer satisfaction.

Closed questions can only be answered with "Yes" and "No".

Questions serve to control the discussion.

Alternative questions are well-suited for scheduling, for example.

The correct answers are:

Closed questions can only be answered with "Yes" and "No".

Questions serve to control the discussion.

Alternative questions are well-suited for scheduling, for example.

What should be observed when receiving a customer complaint?
Please select the correct answers.

Record the customer complaint by listening.

Find and offer a solution as quickly as possible.

Ask questions.

Deny any fault on your part.

The correct answers are:

Record the customer complaint by listening.

Find and offer a solution as quickly as possible.

Ask questions.

Which of the following service(s) does the digital world of Mercedes me offer our customers?
Please select the correct answers.

Online appointment booking

Mercedes me Store

Mercedes me connect: Connectivity services

Online vehicle purchase

The correct answers are:

Online appointment booking

Mercedes me connect: Connectivity services

Online vehicle purchase

Which of the statements about expression and language is/are correct?
Please select the correct answers.

An open posture can convey professionalism, motivation and credibility.

If words, tone of voice and body language are coherent, this increases credibility in the customer conversation.

Positive words and formulations are helpful within customer contact.

Language can give expression to our inner attitude.

The correct answers are:

An open posture can convey professionalism, motivation, and credibility.

If words, tone of voice, and body language are coherent, this increases credibility in the customer conversation.

Positive words and formulations are helpful within customer contact.

Language can give expression to our inner attitude.

Which of these conversational techniques is/are important for handling sales potential professionally?
Please select the correct answers.

Sharpening perception

Active listening

Using questioning techniques

Paraphrasing

The correct answers are:

Active listening

Using questioning techniques

Paraphrasing

Which of these statements contain/s possible sales potential?
Please select the correct answers.

"Sorry about the mess on the rear bench seat."

"Your invoices are getting more and more difficult to understand."

"In the long term, I can't afford the inspection costs for my vehicle. We'll see how I make it work in the future."

"I had no idea that Mercedes-Benz also made watches."

The correct answers are:

"Your invoices are getting more and more difficult to understand."

"In the long term, I can't afford the inspection costs for my vehicle. We'll see how I make it work in the future."

"I had no idea that Mercedes-Benz also made watches."
